text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
My third summer camp with Narita<n>Taishin has
begun!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The other runners—with whom Narita<n>Taishin spent
the last summer<n>camp—drop by to invite her to
train<n>and hang out.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Though Narita Taishin is a little<n>unsure, she's open
to the idea.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text: It appears this summer camp will be a<n>fun one.
